channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish, 2nd April
item.description:
Rubbish bags dumped on recycling bins have split and contents all over the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lordship Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Approx 30 cm pot hole, 2nd April
item.description:
Pot hole in the middle of the road. Has been there for a few weeks and getting worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Nutbrook Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridges on the pavement, 2nd April
item.description:
2 fridges are blocking the pavement. Can these be cleared please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colyers Lane, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting out side 33/34 Prentiss Court, 2nd April
item.description:
Very dark where bins are reported this issue last May 2025 and light still has not been fixed. Safety concerns.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Prentiss Court, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge encroaching pavement., 2nd April
item.description:
The hedge on the corner of Holbrook Way and Magpie Lane, is encroaching onto the pavement. Although it is neatly maintained, it extends far enough to obstruct access. This stretch is already difficult to navigate with buggies due to parked vehicles, and with no space to move further into the path, pedestrians are forced to duck under the hedge to get around the corner
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holbrook Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd April
item.description:
I reported this already, flytipping on street near priestly close, now there is more Maybe enforcement controls need to be inlace as this is a regular occurance all over ravensdale Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravensdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vehicle, 2nd April
item.description:
Vehicles always being dumped along this road,I have an electric car that I can't charge because of this vehicle. Numerous cars dumped all with parking tickets.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 296, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 2nd April
item.description:
Mattress has not been collected in 2 weeks. Bins not emptied last week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Homerton High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: East end Brondesbury villas by garage door even side, 2nd April
item.description:
See photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping close to Charlton church lane 54, 2nd April
item.description:
There is a council CCTV camera now, please do something to address this issue that has been going on for over a year.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen bikes causing obstruction in residents parking bay please remove, 2nd April
item.description:
Fallen bikes causing obstruction in residents parking bay please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ainger Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on cycle sheds, 2nd April
item.description:
Graffiti on 3 cycle sheds on draco st and around

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Draco Street, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Fallen bikes causing obstruction in residents parking bay please remove, 2nd April
item.description:
Fallen bikes causing obstruction in residents parking bay please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ainger Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London

item.title: Fallen bikes causing obstruction in residents parking bay please remove, 2nd April
item.description:
Fallen bikes causing obstruction in residents parking bay please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ainger Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London

item.title: Area hasn't been cleaned after previous reports, 2nd April
item.description:
Please clear
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Premier Corner, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd April
item.description:
A new nonsense graffiti appeared in front of no 26 tunnel avenue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop and surrounding street needs sweeping again, 2nd April
item.description:
Please visit
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle left on our road, 2nd April
item.description:
People are always abandoning their untaxed vehicles on our road and it's cause problems finding parking spaces.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coleraine Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant litter problem on shawbury road, 2nd April
item.description:
Constant litter problem, streets are not swept on a regular basis so litter remains for long periods of time and is added to on a daily basis. The problem has been getting worse over the past year and it’s not acceptable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Shawbury Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unnecessary Road Re-Surfacing, 2nd April
item.description:
You have decided to resurface Chislehurst road (towards Scads Hill) when my road -Kedlestone Drive has wide gaps in the tarmac slabs which causes the door in our house to rattle when traffic passes over them. You have agreed to rectify only two of these yet the whole road from No. 1 to No. 26 is affected.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 204, Chislehurst Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
